description: User dwells on the Add-ons page, cursor stationary at the top right of the screen.
frame_description: The user is viewing the baggage and seat selection options on the Flight Centre website.

description: User hovers over the 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the Add-ons section.
User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button to proceed to the next step of the booking process.
A loading overlay appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' and a progress spinner.
frame_description: The UI transitions to a loading state after the user clicks continue.

description: User waits while the flight confirmation loading screen is displayed.
The page navigates from the Add-ons selection to the Travellers details entry page.
